---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change or addition
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today? Describe the problem,
not just the solution you have in mind.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you set them aside.

## Which plugin(s) are affected

- [ ] Foundation (`loop-and-gate-foundation`)
- [ ] Build Kit (`loop-and-gate-build-kit`)
- [ ] Grow Kit (`loop-and-gate-grow-kit`)
- [ ] Accountability Kit (`loop-and-gate-accountability-kit`)

## Note on skill and gate changes

Skill self-editing and the human-decision gates are load-bearing by design. A
proposal that removes a gate, auto-approves one, or weakens the improve gate will
be declined — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
